CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT str_value, repeat(str_value, 0) AS repeated_zero FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT str_value, repeat(str_value, 5) AS repeated_five FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT str_value, repeat(str_value, 1) AS repeated_once FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT repeat(v.str_value, r.count) AS repeated_value FROM test_strings v JOIN (SELECT 3 AS count) r ON v.id = 1;
SELECT a.str_value, b.str_value, repeat(a.str_value, 2) AS repeated_value FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON a.id <> b.id;
SELECT s.str_value, repeat(s.str_value, n.count) AS repeated_value FROM test_strings s CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS count UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3) n;
SELECT id, repeat(str_value, CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END) AS repeated_str FROM test_strings;
WITH repeated_strings AS (SELECT str_value, repeat(str_value, 4) AS repeated_value FROM test_strings) SELECT * FROM repeated_strings WHERE repeated_value LIKE '%a%';
